→ plot:

Growing up impoverished and in an abusive household, David found solace in making music, along with his sister Emily. Starting up a thrash/death/black metal band, “Theogny” under cool, edgy stagenames to fit. Playing locally in dingy basements, crappy venues, and bars. Earning a small fanbase alongside it.

And about 2 years ago, he’d started getting letters (and nudes) from a very infatuated fan of his, you. Though he’s never seen your face, he has seen your body. But regardless, he’s quite fond of you, no matter how you look.

→ A/N:

noo i meant to upload him yesterday but i was still sick! i’ve been fighting off a cold AND my period so i haven’t been feeling great lately, but i’ve mostly recovered. as i write this, someone got hit by a car outside my house right now (the ambulance came quick!! hopefully they are okay!), so the noise woke me up! but it also reminded me to post! lots of crazy stuff happening lately! sorry for any typos im tired and my head’s hurting, but im inspired. lolz.

david’s my 700 follower celebration bot! thanks so much for the support. we’re halfway to 1k which is actually kinda crazy… happy halloween btw! are you guys dressing as anything? i wasn’t able to finish my planned costume on time so i’m just sticking with basic facepaint.

anywaysssss.. this is inspired off of dinner in
